policy_human_readable:
Entry conditions (logic: AND, all rules must be true):
  Rule 1: stoch(21, 3, 3).k consecutive price

Exit conditions (logic: AND, all rules must be true):
  (none - exits driven by stop-loss and take-profit only)

Take-profit: bb_upper (20, 2.0, 'sma')
